issues.title: Indexable
issues.detail: Page is set to noindex (meta robots). Search engines will drop it from results.
issues.fix: Remove the noindex directive if this page should rank.

issues.title: NAP in structured data
issues.detail: No NAP in structured data.
issues.fix: Add telephone, address, and name to a LocalBusiness or LegalService schema block.

issues.title: HSTS header
issues.detail: Missing. HSTS tells browsers to always use HTTPS.
issues.fix: Add Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains to response headers.

issues.title: X-Content-Type-Options
issues.detail: Missing or incorrect. Prevents MIME-type sniffing.
issues.fix: Add X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff to response headers.

issues.title: Business schema fields
issues.detail: Several core fields missing: telephone, address, areaServed.
issues.fix: Complete the business schema with: telephone, address, areaServed.

issues.title: Attorney / person schema
issues.detail: No Attorney or Person schema. AI systems weight identified, credentialed authors.
issues.fix: Add Attorney or Person schema for the firm's lawyers, linked to the business entity.

issues.title: Question-format headings
issues.detail: No question-format headings. AI models look for Q&A patterns to extract answers.
issues.fix: Add H2 or H3 headings phrased as questions that match queries people type into AI search.

issues.title: Author / reviewer signals
issues.detail: No author or reviewer attribution. Identified authorship is a useful credibility signal for search and AI.
issues.fix: Add author metadata or Person schema, and a reviewed-by line where a lawyer has checked the content.

issues.title: No attorney / team page found
issues.detail: No attorney or team page was found. These pages carry the expertise and authorship signals search and AI weight.
issues.fix: Add an attorney/team page with each lawyer's bio, credentials, and Person schema.

issues.title: Canonical tag
issues.detail: No canonical tag. Duplicate URL variations can split ranking signals.
issues.fix: Add <link rel="canonical"> pointing to the preferred URL for this page.

issues.title: Trust signals
issues.detail: Only 2 of 5 trust signal types found. Trust cues lift intake conversion.
issues.fix: Surface testimonials, reviews, notable results, awards, and bar credentials where visitors can see them.

issues.title: H1 heading
issues.detail: No H1 found. The main heading signals your page topic to search engines.
issues.fix: Add a single <h1> tag as your main page heading. It should clearly state the page's primary topic.

issues.title: FAQPage schema
issues.detail: Not found. FAQ schema packages common questions for search and AI answer engines.
issues.fix: Add FAQPage structured data wrapping your most common client questions and answers.

issues.title: Review / Rating schema
issues.detail: Not found. Review schema can support star ratings in search results.
issues.fix: Add AggregateRating or Review schema for your client testimonials.

issues.title: Authoritative citations
issues.detail: No outbound links to authoritative legal sources.
issues.fix: Link to government, court, or law-society resources where relevant. Corroborating links are a useful credibility signal.

issues.title: Mixed content
issues.detail: 2 HTTP resources on an HTTPS page.
issues.fix: Change all http:// resource URLs to https:// or use protocol-relative URLs.

issues.title: Direct-answer sentences
issues.detail: Some direct-answer content found. Adding more clear definitions can help AI systems extract answers.
issues.fix: Write more sentences that directly answer questions: "X is...", "X means...", "X requires..."
